phrases.tokens_html: 你知道吗？
最近中国科学家做了一件很厉害的事——他们自己研发了一种可以装在飞机上的大气探测设备。
真的吗？
真的！而且已经在无人机上测试成功啦。这说明我们在气象观测方面又往前走了一大步，不用再依赖国外的技术了。
听说AI现在真的会抢工作了？
没错。IBM的CEO就说了，他们公司已经有好几百个职位被AI取代了。
哇，那会不会以后很多人都找不到工作了？
他说公司正在适应这个变化，AI确实在改变工作方式，但也可能会带来新的机会。
你有没有听过“王选新闻科学技术奖”？
好像有点印象，是跟新闻科技有关的奖吧？
对啊！江苏广电总台今年在这个奖项里拿了好几个奖，甚至还有“终身成就奖”。
厉害了，看来他们在科技新闻这块儿真是做得不错。

zh|还.definition: still; still in progress; still more; to pay back; to return;

zh|哇.definition: Wow!; sound of child's crying; sound of vomiting; replaces 啊[a5] when following the vowel "u" or "ao";

zh|家.definition:
see 傢伙|家伙[jia1 huo5]; 
; home; family; (polite) my (sister, uncle etc)

zh|成功.definition:
Chenggong or Chengkung town in Taitung County 臺東縣|台东县[Tai2 dong1 Xian4], southeast Taiwan; 
; success; to succeed; CL:次[ci4],個|个[ge4]

zh|说明.definition: to explain; to illustrate; to indicate

zh|上.definition:
used in 上聲|上声[shang3 sheng1]; 
; on top; upon; above

zh|吗.definition:
see 嗎啡|吗啡, morphine; 
; (question particle for "yes-no" questions);

zh|啦.definition: (onom.) sound of singing, cheering etc; (phonetic); (dialect) to chat; sentence-final particle, contraction of 了啊, indicating exclamation; particle placed after each item in a list of examples;

zh|你.definition: you (informal, as opposed to courteous 您[nin2]);

zh|会.definition: can (i.e. have the skill, know how to); likely to; sure to; to balance an account; accountancy; accounting

zh|啊.definition: interjection of surprise; Ah!; Oh!; interjection expressing doubt or requiring answer; Eh?; what?; interjection of surprise or doubt; Eh?; My!; interjection or grunt of agreement; uhm; Ah, OK; modal particle ending sentence, showing affirmation, approval, or consent;

zh|过.definition: to cross; to go over; to pass (time); (experienced action marker);

zh|做.definition: to do; to make; to produce

zh|现在.definition: now; at present; at the moment

zh|得.definition:
to obtain; to get; to gain; structural particle: used after a verb (or adjective as main verb), linking it to following phrase indicating effect, degree, possibility etc; 
; to have to; must; ought to

zh|拿.definition: to hold; to seize; to catch

zh|测试.definition: to test (machinery etc); to test (students); test

zh|依赖.definition: to depend on; to be dependent on;

zh|真是.definition: indeed; truly; (coll.) (used to express disapproval, annoyance etc about sth)

zh|会不会.definition: (posing a question: whether sb, something) can or cannot?; is able to or not;

zh|听说.definition: to hear (sth said); one hears (that); hearsay

zh|带来.definition: to bring; to bring about; to produce

zh|观测.definition: to observe; to survey; observation (scientific etc)

zh|跟.definition: heel; to follow closely; to go with

zh|江苏.definition: Jiangsu province (Kiangsu) in southeast China, abbr. 蘇|苏, capital Nanjing 南京;

zh|也.definition: also; too; (in Classical Chinese) final particle implying affirmation

zh|说.definition:
to persuade; 
; to speak; to say; to explain

zh|取代.definition: to replace; to supersede; to supplant

zh|都.definition: all; both; entirely; capital city; metropolis;

zh|他.definition: he or him; (used for either sex when the sex is unknown or unimportant); (used before sb's name for emphasis)

zh|正.definition:
first month of the lunar year; 
; straight; upright; proper

zh|里.definition: lining; interior; inside; li, ancient measure of length, approx. 500 m; neighborhood; ancient administrative unit of 25 families

zh|而且.definition: (not only ...) but also; moreover; in addition

zh|改变.definition: to change; to alter; to transform

zh|到.definition: to (a place); until (a time); up to

zh|探测.definition: to probe; to take readings; to explore

zh|王选.definition: Wang Xuan (1937-2006), Chinese printing industry innovator;

zh|听.definition:
smile (archaic); 
; to listen; to hear; to obey; (literary pronunciation, still advocated in Taiwan) to rule; to sentence; to allow

zh|有.definition: to have; there is; there are

zh|知道.definition: to know; to become aware of; also pr. [zhi1 dao5]

zh|件.definition: item; component; classifier for events, things, clothes etc

zh|有关.definition: to have sth to do with; to relate to; related to

zh|走.definition: to walk; to go; to run

zh|适应.definition: to adapt; to fit; to suit

zh|找.definition: to try to find; to look for; to call on sb

zh|了.definition: (completed action marker); (modal particle indicating change of state, situation now); (modal particle intensifying preceding clause); (of eyes) bright; clear-sighted; to understand clearly

zh|种.definition: seed; species; kind; to plant; to grow; to cultivate

zh|厉害.definition: (used to describe sb or sth that makes a very strong impression, whether favorable or unfavorable) terrible; intense; severe

zh|抢.definition:
see 搶風|抢风[qiang1 feng1]; 
; to fight over; to rush; to scramble

zh|有没有.definition: (before a noun) Do (you, they etc) have ...?; Is there a ...?; (before a verb) Did (you, they etc) (verb, infinitive)?

zh|吧.definition: bar (loanword) (serving drinks, or providing Internet access etc); to puff (on a pipe etc); (onom.) bang; (modal particle indicating suggestion or surmise); ...right?; ...OK?; (onom.) smack!;

zh|工作.definition: to work; (of a machine) to operate; job

zh|这.definition: this; these; (commonly pr. [zhei4] before a classifier, esp. in Beijing)
